task_name: Apache Error Log - Create Error Timeline
notes: Excellent execution. All required criteria met: error_timeline.json created with correct structure; all 8 days covered with accurate error counts; June 11 correctly identified as peak (305 errors); peak burst properly attributed to 202.133.98.6 at 03:03:03 with 254 errors in 11 seconds; server restarts documented for Jun 9, 10, 12. Minor deduction (0.05) for burst end time being 03:03:14 instead of closer to 03:03:10, though the 11-second window is reasonable and captures ~254 errors. The awstats/CGI scanning description is accurate and matches the log analysis.
